mapper.sql: f.id, f.residence_id, f.employee_id, f.employee_name, f.dormitory_id, f.dormitory_name, f.room_id, f.room_name, f.period_start, f.period_end, f.stay_days, f.daily_rate, f.base_amount, f.daily_supplies_cost, f.total_amount, f.status, f.confirmed_at, f.created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM fees f WHERE f.id = #{id} AND f.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, residence_id, employee_id, employee_name, dormitory_id, dormitory_name, room_id, room_name, period_start, period_end, stay_days, daily_rate, base_amount, daily_supplies_cost, total_amount, status, confirmed_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM fees WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fees (residence_id, employee_id, employee_name, dormitory_id, dormitory_name, room_id, room_name, period_start, period_end, stay_days, daily_rate, base_amount, daily_supplies_cost, total_amount, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{residenceId}, #{employeeId}, #{employeeName}, #{dormitoryId}, #{dormitoryName}, #{roomId}, #{roomName}, #{periodStart}, #{periodEnd}, #{stayDays}, #{dailyRate}, #{baseAmount}, #{dailySuppliesCost}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT rh.id, rh.employee_id, rh.resident_name AS employee_name, rh.room_id, rm.name AS room_name, d.id AS dormitory_id, d.name AS dormitory_name, rh.check_in_date, rh.check_out_date, d.daily_rate AS daily_rate FROM residence_histories rh INNER JOIN rooms rm ON rm.id = rh.room_id AND rm.deleted_at IS NULL INNER JOIN dormitories d ON d.id = rm.dormitory_id AND d.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE rh.deleted_at IS NULL AND rh.check_in_date <= #{monthEnd} AND (rh.check_out_date IS NULL OR rh.check_out_date >= #{monthStart}) ORDER BY rh.id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE fees SET period_start = #{periodStart}, period_end = #{periodEnd}, stay_days = #{stayDays}, daily_rate = #{dailyRate}, base_amount = #{baseAmount}, daily_supplies_cost = #{dailySuppliesCost}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'pending' AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE fees SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
